inputs.titre: Création de la police royale à Paris

reason: The image depicts a man in attire resembling that of the newly formed Royal Police in Paris around 1667. He wears a tricorne hat and a coat that could be interpreted as a justacorps, although the material is questionable. The street is cobbled and the buildings feature stone architecture, which are elements congruent with the era. However, there are details such as the uniform buttons and the cut of the coat that seem slightly off for the period. The building in the distance on the right side of the frame has windows that looks out of place. A car is visible in the background. Number plates are too modern. Overall, while the image evokes the general setting, some elements are inaccurate, hindering a perfect historical representation.
